name: First Foods Group, Inc.
summary: First Foods Group, Inc. provides funding options and management services for supplement brands and menu concepts in the United States. The company focuses on new brands and concepts, including the wholesaling of various health-related products; and developing specialty chocolate product line. It also participates in the merchant cash advances. The company was formerly known as Litera Group, Inc. and changed its name to First Foods Group, Inc. in February 2017. First Foods Group, Inc. was incorporated in 2015 and is headquartered in Las Vegas, Nevada.
